mapper.select: select * from useractivity where userId = #{userId, jdbcType = BIGINT} and serverId = #{serverId, jdbcType=INTEGER}
mapper.update: update useractivity set vipRewardGet = #{vipRewardGet,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, rewardContext = #{rewardContext,jdbcType=LONGVARCHAR}, rewardVesionIdList = #{rewardVesionIdList,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, isEvaluated = #{isEvaluated,jdbcType=INTEGER} where userId = #{userId,jdbcType=BIGINT} and serverId = #{serverId,jdbcType=INTEGER}
